case_title: YA LING SHEN KONG VS. SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID DISTRICT ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-08-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-08-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, WENDY YU SWORN AS CANTONES INTERPRETER ON HER BEHALF. APPEARANCES MADE BY BOTH NAMED DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KONG, YA LING SHEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID DISTRICT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2015 - JUDGMENT.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KONG, YA LING SHEN AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID DISTRICT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-08-2015 AT 8:30 AM.
